programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Jim and Jill look at lakeside properties with luxe boathouses, tennis courts and private hiking trails.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: In Ohio, two brothers build a high-end, off-grid vacation home on their family's cattle ranch.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple are battling against the harsh winter weather to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A couple race to finish a modern, off-grid lodge overlooking the south shore of Lake Superior.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A couple builds a rainforest retreat within the edge of an active volcano on Hawaii's Big Island.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Kolin Buzerak returns to his family's 100-acre property in Upstate New York to put down some roots; he plans to build an off-grid timber frame cabin with a full kitchen, living space, dining area, and open loft bedroom.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines
programme.sub-title: A Natural Pool Oasis for All Seasons
programme.desc: Cappie and Alex carve out a luxury natural swimming pool with a handmade boulder wall, eco-filtration and native landscaping to create an all-season oasis and the ultimate gathering spot for friends, family and guests.

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines
programme.desc: Cappie and Alex create a one-of-a-kind escape by anchoring a sailboat into the South Dakota earth and crafting a three-sided dock for their landlocked boat-loving clients; it's a dry-docked dream with sunset views and zero waves.

programme.title: Capturing Home
programme.sub-title: A Dining Room for Sunday Suppers
programme.desc: A couple wants to use their driveway and garage for hosting dinners with friends and family; Kate and Amy blend their styles, using bold colors and attention to detail to create an intimate and cozy space for spending time together.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Capturing Home
programme.desc: A couple dreams of turning their garage and backyard into a welcoming space to entertain and screen movies, but they don't know where to start; they turn to Amy and Kate to transform the spaces into a luxurious retreat for dinner and a show.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Catherine and Neil tour three waterfront properties hoping to find a place to build memories.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Rory and Karly dream of raising their kids in a house on the lake, and they're searching for their very first waterfront property; he likes modern and she wants rustic; will this couple come to a compromise, or will they need two lake houses?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Don and Agnes visit lakefront properties in search of their forever home after retirement.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.sub-title: Andrew and Andrea's Lakeside Party Place
programme.desc: A couple searches for a waterfront property that offers a place to hold lakeside gatherings.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: An entrepreneur checks out some waterfront properties, which feature private lighthouses and personal helicopter landing pads.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: A couple looks for an upmarket lakehouse with a sandy beach and trampolines.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Rory and Karly dream of raising their kids in a house on the lake, and they're searching for their very first waterfront property; he likes modern and she wants rustic; will this couple come to a compromise, or will they need two lake houses?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Rory and Karly dream of raising their kids in a house on the lake, and they're searching for their very first waterfront property; he likes modern and she wants rustic; will this couple come to a compromise, or will they need two lake houses?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Don and Agnes visit lakefront properties in search of their forever home after retirement.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.sub-title: Andrew and Andrea's Lakeside Party Place
programme.desc: A couple searches for a waterfront property that offers a place to hold lakeside gatherings.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett tackles a historic Victorian home built by Andrew McNally of Rand McNally publishing fame; to retain the home's grandeur, Brett relocates the kitchen and entryway; he tackles the main bedroom and bath, which have lost their original style.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett is challenged to give the owners of a 1954 midcentury modern California ranch the updated functionality they need while convincing them to keep and embrace most of the home's original features.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: The new homeowners want to return thier home to its proper look and style, so they ask Brett to put in a new kitchen that retains the original cabinetry and style, but also provides better functionality for a modern family.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett helps a young family preserve the beautiful, original mid-century woodwork and cabinetry of their 1955 ranch home and creates more light and functionality in the kitchen.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: In a unique neighborhood of 1920s-era English cottages, homeowners want Brett to bring their home back to its original splendor before they move in.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: After attempting to restore their Craftsman bungalow on their own, a couple needs Brett's help to finish the job; Brett's challenge is to create functional spaces that stay true to the style.

programme.title: Happy to Be Home
programme.desc: Gray steps outside of her comfort zone as she and Grumpy take on their first non-historic house; Grumpy is delighted by the clean lines and ease of renovation; Gray is challenged by the open floor plan in this family's contemporary, 1970s home.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays restore an early 20th century beach bungalow for an older couple who have deep roots in Galveston; they bring the original charm of the home that had been lost in the living room, dining room and bathroom spaces.

programme.title: Happy to Be Home
programme.desc: Gray steps outside of her comfort zone as she and Grumpy take on their first non-historic house; Grumpy is delighted by the clean lines and ease of renovation; Gray is challenged by the open floor plan in this family's contemporary, 1970s home.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays help a first-time homeowner bring back character to the 1940s home she describes as her Millennial Mansion; with features like a reclaimed brick porch, custom woodwork inside and a colorful new kitchen, it's a complete transformation.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays restore an early 20th century beach bungalow for an older couple who have deep roots in Galveston; they bring the original charm of the home that had been lost in the living room, dining room and bathroom spaces.

programme.desc: The Cordrays help a first-time homeowner bring back character to the 1940s home she describes as her Millennial Mansion; with features like a reclaimed brick porch, custom woodwork inside and a colorful new kitchen, it's a complete transformation.

programme.desc: Brett tackles a historic Victorian home built by Andrew McNally of Rand McNally publishing fame; to retain the home's grandeur, Brett relocates the kitchen and entryway; he tackles the main bedroom and bath, which have lost their original style.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett is challenged to give the owners of a 1954 midcentury modern California ranch the updated functionality they need while convincing them to keep and embrace most of the home's original features.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: The new homeowners want to return thier home to its proper look and style, so they ask Brett to put in a new kitchen that retains the original cabinetry and style, but also provides better functionality for a modern family.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett helps a young family preserve the beautiful, original mid-century woodwork and cabinetry of their 1955 ranch home and creates more light and functionality in the kitchen.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays restore an early 20th century beach bungalow for an older couple who have deep roots in Galveston; they bring the original charm of the home that had been lost in the living room, dining room and bathroom spaces.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: An entrepreneur checks out some waterfront properties, which feature private lighthouses and personal helicopter landing pads.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: A couple looks for an upmarket lakehouse with a sandy beach and trampolines.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Two sisters look for a perfectly-balanced luxury lakehouse.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Jessica is an art dealer and collector, specializing in ancient and tribal artifacts. She's on the hunt for the perfect place to unwind by the water. The challenge is in finding a rustic retreat that can also house her unconventional collection.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.sub-title: Mish and Phi's Escape From the Limelight
programme.desc: A couple of actors search for a waterfront escape.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Liz and Jake both work in the tech industry; they are recently engaged and are looking for a lakefront property to host their wedding nuptials and move into; their home tours include a home with a cliffside outdoor entertainment area.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Two sisters look for a perfectly-balanced luxury lakehouse.

programme.desc: Jessica is an art dealer and collector, specializing in ancient and tribal artifacts. She's on the hunt for the perfect place to unwind by the water. The challenge is in finding a rustic retreat that can also house her unconventional collection.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: With their children grown, a couple agrees it's time to downsize their home as they enter retirement; priorities include a large kitchen, a nice living space and the right location.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Andrew and Brittany are first-time buyers; they're looking for a home with plenty of space for their beloved pooches.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
